name: hami-app
description: Hami Legal System - Iraqi Legal Case Management - V1 Admin Edition

scripts.test:security: vitest run src/app/api/security/wifeValidator.test.ts src/app/api/security/wifeSecurityMonitor.test.ts src/app/api/security/stolenTokenServer.test.ts src/app/api/security/wifeRateLimitStore.test.ts src/app/api/security/csrfServerStore.test.ts src/app/api/security/contentSecurityPolicy.test.ts src/app/api/security/bffAuth.test.ts src/app/api/security/roleResolver.test.ts src/app/api/comms-dispatcher/route.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/kvProxyOwnership.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/deviceId.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/wifeRedTeamAttack.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/wifeFullAppDestruction.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/wifeFullAppDestructionRoutes.test.ts src/app/security/__tests__/wifeUploadDestruction.test.ts src/app/services/__tests__/wifeFetchGuard.test.ts src/app/api/security/sanitizer.test.ts src/app/api/security/fileValidator.test.ts src/app/api/upload/route.test.ts src/app/api/upload/remove/route.test.ts src/app/api/laws/list/route.test.ts src/app/api/laws/add/route.test.ts src/app/services/server/MalwareScanService.test.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:run && npm run test:e2e
scripts.health: npm run health:utf8 && npm run health:security && npm run health:case-files && npm run health:resources && npm run typecheck
scripts.release:check: npm run health && npm run build && npm run health:bundle && npm run test:run
scripts.release:check:full: npm run release:check && npm run test:e2e:boot
scripts.deploy:cloudflare:pages: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name=hami-app
